title: Exposure Knowlogy
description: Knowlogy Book extension for Exposure mod
body:
![Exposure Category](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/exposure/main/assets/images/exposure-category.png)

[![Available for Fabric](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/fabric/compact-supports.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure-knowlogy/versions?l=fabric)
[![Available for NeoForge](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/neoforge/compact-supports.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure-knowlogy/versions?l=neoforge)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/onbX6Nsj?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&labelColor=03190a&color=1e1e1e)](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure-knowlogy)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1230608?style=flat&logo=curseforge&label=Downloads&labelColor=241009&color=1e1e1e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/exposure-knowlogy)

This is an addon mod for [Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy) that adds [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) mod descriptions to the **Book o' Knowlogy**, showing information from the [official Exposure Wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/exposure/docs).

## Dependencies

[![Knowlogy Book](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/knowlogy/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy)
[![Exposure](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/exposure/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
[![Exposure: Polaroid](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/exposure-polaroid/compact-recommends.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure-polaroid)

## Features

### Crafting Recipes

![Film Entry](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/exposure/main/assets/images/film-entry.png)

Shows recipes for each item and block and links to related entries.

### How to Use

![Camer Controls Page](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/exposure/main/assets/images/camera-controls-page.png)

Has images and dynamic keybinds for a better undertanding of the controls.

### Deep Explanations

![Chromatic Process Page](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/exposure/main/assets/images/chromatic-process-page.png)

Teaches how the gameplay works.

### Addon Support

![Instant Camera Entry](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/exposure/main/assets/images/instant-camera-entry.png)

Includes entries for [Exposure: Polaroid](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure-polaroid).

## Help the Project
